leadText: Max Mushrooms (Japanese: ダイキノコ Dai Mushroom) are an item that was introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Out-of-battle effect [ edit | edit source ] Three clusters of Max Mushrooms can be exchanged for a bowl of Max Soup , allowing a compatible Pokémon to gain a Gigantamax Factor , or revert their status. Feeding Max Soup to Urshifu requires that one comb of Max Honey be added to the exchange. In-battle effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Attack , Defense , Special Attack , Special Defense , and Speed of a Pokémon currently in battle by one stage each.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh IA Warm-Up Tunnel (×3, after defeating Klara Sw / Avery Sh for the second time) Courageous Cavern , Brawlers' Cave , Forest of Focus , Warm-Up Tunnel (a single cluster spawns in one of these locations after three Max Raid Battles )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Mushrooms that have the power of changing Dynamax forms. They boost all stats of a Pokémon during battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description GO An item that increases the damage your Pokémon deal in Max Battles for 30 minutes.
